cost_analysis.note: Backtest plays each suggestion against every historical draw.

prev_suggestions_performance.note: No draws occurred after suggestions were generated.

analysis.llm_summary: Top picks are selected from the candidate shortlist with the highest scores, ensuring alignment with the most frequent digits per position and avoiding duplicates. The top5 are the strongest scoring numbers, and the top50 includes a broader set of high-score candidates reflecting frequent digit patterns observed in recent draws.
